title: Allow decimals for the quote and invoicing adjustments
excerpt: It is currently impossible to adjust the pricing to the exact amount you want within the quote feature. You would have to adjust the product price, quote and then adjust it back. Please add in the possibility to use deci…

posts.author: DanielKorenPub (Daniel Sacks)
posts.cookedHtml: It is currently impossible to adjust the pricing to the exact amount you want within the quote feature. You would have to adjust the product price, quote and then adjust it back. Please add in the possibility to use decimals for the adjustment amounts and percentages!
